checks.name: RAW and ubiquitous-language traceability
checks.notes: Used the copied SQNT-03E connector RAW trace and reducer-route inventory facts. No external rules source was read outside the cleanroom boundary.

checks.name: Architecture and no-redundant-state
checks.notes: Existing selected-spell and Starry Wisp adapters contain projection witnesses but no generic BattleState owner for object-attached or held light emitter lifecycle. Added one canonical BattleState.object_light_route owner and left table geometry/durability facts as adapter witnesses.

checks.name: Connascence
checks.notes: Object/light subject variants, route family, owner mapping, fill gates, state transitions, and stale-subject checks are colocated in battle_reducer_spine generic route machinery. Object-attached emitter admission now requires the typed ObjectTargetAdmitted route state instead of relying on caller order.

checks.name: Code review
checks.notes: Focused tests compare expected connector routes with observed public reducer route events for all 9 SQNT-03E connector actions.

checks.name: Reviewer-loop convergence
checks.notes: Second pass found no additional reasonable findings after focused test and evidence validation.
